# Research Plan — Guava Weight Estimation via Computer Vision

<!-- CARIAK PLAN: guava-weight-estimator — Generated by cariak-planning v1.3 -->
<!-- Input: research-spec.md from cariak-grinding -->
<!-- Date: 2026-07-06 -->

## Research Questions (from grinding spec)

### RQ1: What is the proven accuracy ceiling for monocular fruit weight estimation?
- Given the academic literature and commercial systems
- When we survey papers and industry documentation
- Then we identify the best-achieved accuracy numbers AND the deployment constraints
- **Assigned sub-agents:** academic-researcher, internet-researcher
- **Priority:** HIGH

### RQ2: What is the optimal CV architecture for guava weight estimation from a single top-down camera?
- Given GGP's existing YOLOv8 counter and single RTSP camera setup
- When we evaluate YOLOv11-seg vs geometric volume models vs direct CNN regression
- Then we recommend the architecture with the best accuracy-to-complexity ratio
- **Assigned sub-agents:** internet-researcher (engineering blogs, code), academic-researcher (papers)
- **Priority:** HIGH

### RQ3: What edge hardware is cost-optimal for per-lane deployment in a packing house environment?
- Given conveyor belt conditions, dust, vibration, 24/7 operation
- When we compare Jetson Orin, RPi+Hailo, Coral TPU, and industrial cameras
- Then we produce a per-lane BOM with total cost and vendor sources
- **Assigned sub-agents:** market-researcher (pricing), news-researcher (industry trends)
- **Priority:** HIGH

### RQ4: What do practitioners and commercial systems reveal that academic papers don't?
- Given Reddit, Hacker News, GitHub, YouTube, and commercial vendor docs
- When we search for real-world deployment experiences and commercial system specs
- Then we identify the gap between academic claims and production reality
- **Assigned sub-agents:** social-researcher (practitioner), news-researcher (commercial)
- **Priority:** MEDIUM

### RQ5: What validation protocol and statistical framework should GGP use to prove the system works?
- Given ±8% target accuracy and 3 guava varieties
- When we design the experiment (sample size, stratification, statistical tests)
- Then we produce a validation protocol that passes engineering review
- **Assigned sub-agents:** internet-researcher (validation methods), academic-researcher (statistical design)
- **Priority:** MEDIUM

## Sub-Agent Task Decomposition

| Task ID | Sub-Agent | Research Question | Key Search Terms | Expected Sources | Output File |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| T1 | internet-researcher | RQ1, RQ2 | "fruit weight estimation CV", "YOLO weight regression", "guava quality ML", "TOMRA fruit grading" | 8-12 | findings/internet-findings.md |
| T2 | academic-researcher | RQ1, RQ2, RQ5 | "monocular fruit weight deep learning", "guava computer vision", "agricultural produce sizing" | 6-10 papers | findings/academic-findings.md |
| T3 | social-researcher | RQ4 | Reddit r/computervision, HN "fruit grading", GitHub agricultural CV, Stack Overflow | 6-10 discussions | findings/social-findings.md |
| T4 | news-researcher | RQ3, RQ4 | "packing house automation 2025", "agritech investment fruit grading", "TOMRA Compac Greefa" | 6-8 articles | findings/news-findings.md |
| T5 | market-researcher | RQ3 | "Jetson Orin pricing", "RPi AI HAT Hailo-8", "Basler camera price", "load cell RS-232", "LED machine vision" | 5-8 vendors | findings/market-findings.md |

## Output Document Routing (Clarify Gate decision)

| Requested Document | Format | Generated By | Phase |
|---|---|---|---|
| research-report.docx | DOCX (primary), MD (fallback) | cariak-synthesizing | After all sub-agents |
| references.json | JSON | cariak-synthesizing | After all sub-agents |
| implementation-roadmap.docx | DOCX | cariak-synthesizing (on-demand) | After report |
| feasibility-study.docx | DOCX | cariak-synthesizing (on-demand) | After report |
| risk-register.docx | DOCX | Embedded in research-report | During synthesis |

## Execution Order

```
T1, T2, T3, T4, T5 → ALL PARALLEL (independent)
         ↓
    cariak-synthesizing (sequential — needs all findings)
         ↓
    research-report.docx + references.json
```

## Dependency Graph
```
academic-researcher ─┐
internet-researcher ─┤
social-researcher ───┼──→ synthesizing ──→ research-report.docx
news-researcher ─────┤                    └─→ references.json
market-researcher ───┘                    └─→ on-demand DOCX outputs
```

## Success Metrics
- [ ] All 5 sub-agents return findings with ≥5 cited sources each
- [ ] Cross-source synthesis resolves ≥3 contradictions
- [ ] Confidence scores assigned to ≥7 key claims
- [ ] research-report.docx generated with all 10 sections
- [ ] references.json contains ≥20 structured citations
- [ ] No claim without source (Iron Law 1)
